case_title: GLEN H. YBANEZ VS. UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YBANEZ, GLEN H. AS TO DEFENDANT UNIVERSITY OF CALIFORNIA SAN FRANCISCO SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-28-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-26-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-13-2005
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR DEC-21-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST GLEN H. YBANEZ, FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: MAR-14-2005, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-29-2005. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: JOANN PRIOR, CSR	129. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-16-2005 AT 1:30PM. THE COURT FINDS NO GOOD CAUSE OR SUBSTANTIAL JUSTIFICATION FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE PREVIOUS COURT ORDERS. A LESS SEVERE SANCTION WOULD NOT BE EFFECTIVE DUE TO THE HISTORY OF LACK OF COMPLIANCE. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: KATHY KOLLEHNER, CSR#4102. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-16-2005 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substancial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. Therefore, It is hereby ordered that this matter is dismissed. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Kathy Kollehner, CSR#4102. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Continued To May-16-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $350.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 5/16/2005 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Joann Prior, CSR 129. (212)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2005 Set For Order To Show Cause On Mar-14-05 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-21-2004 Sanctions
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff in Propria Persona is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings reported by: Candence Yount. (212)
